channel.title: Reading Readiness on Early Reading Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Reading Readiness on Early Reading Tools

item.title: Reading Readiness: 10 Signs Your Child Is Ready to Learn to Read
item.description: Learn the 10 signs of reading readiness in children ages 3–6, and what to do if your child isn't showing them yet. When to start phonics instruction.

item.title: How to Teach Your Child to Read at Home: A Step-by-Step Parent's Guide
item.description: A complete guide for parents on how to teach a child to read — covering phonemic awareness, phonics, sight words, fluency, and comprehension in the right order.
